## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New algorithm / feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] New public functions have `///` doc comments
- [ ] New algorithms have at least one unit test
- [ ] If adding a Python binding: the new function is registered in `threecrate()` in `lib.rs` and documented in `threecrate-python/README.md`
